Dialog.name: MSG_718_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 211}You needn't hurry. The moment we await is predestined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 1 211}It makes no difference whether it comes sooner or later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 3}I got some words for you bastards... But today, we're here to save the world![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Please be careful! I sense an even greater power than before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 1 211}Even as I speak, I can feel it. The end of everything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 1 211}I pity those who cannot see the blessing it truly is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 1 211}We are mere mortals; we cannot change our fate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_3_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 1 211}I don't like the look in your eyes... What is it that you see before you now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_718_3_3
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Only the opponent in front of me.

Dialog.name: MSG_718_3_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 1 211}A promise. That's truly ridiculous. How absurd... I can't bear to watch you all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_3_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 1 211}Hope. That's truly ridiculous. How absurd... I can't bear to watch you all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_3_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 1 211}An admirable spirit. That's right... That's how it should be![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_4_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 1 211}Why...? Fate is supposed to have chosen me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 1 211}This again... Is my resolve still not strong enough...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_4_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 13 1 211}If so... I'll throw away my trivial pride![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_4_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 14 1 211}With my entire being! {f 4 3}! I will bring you to your knees![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_4_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 -1 0 0}Ah! Everyone has been struck by fear! I have a bad feeling about this! Please get up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_5_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 15 1 211}Hahaha... It seems we are destined to be at odds...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 16 1 211}How can you summon such power even in the face of death...? Incorrigible, as always...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_6_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}This isn't about revenge... We're fighting to protect something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_7_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 8 -1 -1 0 0}What the hell...? Why can he use Theurgy!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_718_7_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 5 -1 -1 0 0}I have to heal everyone... quickly...![n]{f 1 1}
